steps.title: The Positional Push
steps.text: 1.d4 claims the center and prepares c4. Games are more positional than 1.e4 — slow strategic battles over pawn structures and outposts.

steps.title: Main Responses
steps.text: Black's options: 1...d5 (classical, leads to Queen's Gambit), 1...Nf6 (Indian defenses — hypermodern), 1...f5 (Dutch), 1...e6 (flexible). The Indian defenses are the modern grandmaster choice.

steps.prompt: Play the classical 1...d5 — stake your own claim.
